nasb.text: But He sets the needy securely on high away from affliction, And makes his families like a flock.

esv.text: but he raises up the needy out of affliction and makes their families like flocks.

cnv.text: 他卻把貧窮的人安置在高處，免受苦難， 使他的家族繁衍，好像羊群。

ccb.text: 但祂搭救贫苦的人脱离苦难， 使他们家族兴旺，多如羊群。

csbs.text: 但他把贫穷的人安置在高处，脱离苦难， 使他们的家族多如羊群。
